{{Infobox character
| name = Balari
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Balari]] is the [[Herald of the Silent Servants]] and a [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Balari]] is a person [[Kelsa]] knows.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Balari]] is the [[Silent Herald]] who appeared to assist [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
